svg.title: Ray Lin — Agentic Systems Engineer
svg.desc: Ray Lin, agentic systems engineer. Building the infrastructure, workflows, and evaluation systems that let frontier models execute complex tasks reliably. Creator of UniBench, a benchmark-aware model intelligence layer. Based in Taipei, Taiwan.
svg.text: >_ AGENT SKILLS • HARNESSES • LOOPS • EVALS • ORCHESTRATION

g.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', 'Liberation Mono', monospace

svg.text: Building the infrastructure that lets frontier models execute complex tasks — reliably.
Turning AI from a chat interface into an executable, auditable, self-improving work system.
Models as composable components: planners, executors, critics, verifiers, repair loops.
UniBench: benchmark-aware routing — assign every task to the model best suited for it.
